turtle_soup.how_it_works: Identifies false breakouts (liquidity sweeps) of recent swing highs and lows on the 15m chart. Waits for a reversal candle confirming rejection, then refines entry on the 1m chart. Stop is 0.30× ATR below/above entry. TP1 at 1.0R (25% position closed, stop moved to break-even), trailing ATR stop on the remainder, TP2 at 3.0R. Risk: 0.5% per trade.

vwap.how_it_works: Enters when price deviates significantly from the rolling session VWAP (Volume-Weighted Average Price). A 4h EMA-200 ±2% band gate blocks counter-trend entries — no longs when the market is in a confirmed downtrend, no shorts in an uptrend. Exits fire in priority order: SL cross → TP cross → VWAP reclaim → 240-minute time decay. Risk: 1% per trade.

ict_scalp_5m.how_it_works: Trades the ICT sweep → displacement → fair-value-gap sequence. Waits for price to sweep a recent swing high/low (liquidity grab), confirm a displacement candle (body > 1.3× ATR), then enters on a wick-rejection back out of the resulting FVG. A 1h EMA-20 higher-timeframe bias gate blocks counter-trend entries. Stop is ATR-buffered beyond the sweep; take-profit at 1.5R. Risk: 0.3% per trade.

trend_donchian.how_it_works: Enters LONG on a Donchian(20) channel breakout — price closing above the highest high of the prior 20 bars. Initial stop is 2.5× ATR(14); the sole profit-exit is a Chandelier ATR trailing stop at 5.0× (no fixed take-profit), so winners run until the trend reverses. Long-only since 2026-06-01: the regime×direction matrix (docs/research/regime-roster-matrix-2026-06-01.md) showed the short side is a net −37 R drag that earns only in chop, while the long side is the +47 R trend edge; the chop-only short edge will be reclaimed via the planned regime router (docs/research/regime-router-design-2026-06-01.md). Risk: 0.3% per trade. Re-tuned 2h/trail3.5 → 1h/trail5.0 on 2026-06-01 (#2554), the OOS-best corner from the overnight walk-forward.

fade_breakout_4h.how_it_works: The mirror of the trend-follower: fades FAILED Donchian(20) breakouts — a bar that pierces the prior channel then closes back inside (a liquidity grab that rejected) — but only in choppy regimes (ADX < 20). Initial stop sits 0.5× ATR beyond the rejection wick; a Chandelier ATR trail at 3.5× is the primary profit-exit, with an ~8-day (48-bar) time-decay close as a backstop for stalled trades. Validated as an uncorrelated complement to trend_donchian. Risk: 0.3% per trade.

squeeze_breakout_4h.how_it_works: Trades the Bollinger-in-Keltner squeeze: when the Bollinger Bands (20, 2.0σ) contract inside the Keltner Channels (1.0× ATR) the market is coiled; entry fires on the expansion breakout out of that compression. Initial stop is 2.5× ATR(14); a Chandelier ATR trail at 3.5× is the sole profit-exit. A different entry trigger than the price-channel strategies, chosen for its low correlation with the live trend-follower. Risk: 0.3% per trade.

fvg_range_15m.short: FVG mean-reversion inside a confirmed range, 15m BTCUSDT
fvg_range_15m.how_it_works: The range member of the roster — the deliberate opposite of ict_scalp_5m (which uses an FVG for directional continuation). Inside a confirmed STATIC horizontal range (ADX < 20 chop, sane width, and BOTH support & resistance touched ≥ 4 times), an unfilled Fair Value Gap sitting in the lower third (long) or upper third (short) is treated as a mean-reversion S/R level. Entry fires on a wick-rejection at the gap (price wicks into the gap and closes back out of it with a matching-direction body); the stop sits 0.25× ATR beyond the gap/range boundary (a range BREAK invalidates the thesis) and the target is the OPPOSITE boundary (full-range reversion). A time-decay backstop closes the trade after 48 bars if the range stalls. Risk: 0.3% per trade. Wired execution: shadow 2026-05-30, then PROMOTED to execution: live 2026-06-02 (operator policy: paper/demo accounts always execute) — runs on the bybit_1 DEMO account ONLY (paper money, no real-money risk); adding it to real-money bybit_2 stays a separate Tier-3 gate.

htf_pullback_trend_2h.how_it_works: Requires a higher-timeframe uptrend (close above the Donchian-40 midline), then buys a pullback into the lower half of the recent 10-bar range, riding a wide Chandelier ATR trail (trail_mult 5.0) to let winners run. The pullback entry is the deliberate complement to trend_donchian's breakout entry into the same let-winners-run exit. Wired execution: shadow on bybit_1 (demo) 2026-06-01, then PROMOTED to execution: live 2026-06-02 (operator policy: paper/demo accounts always execute) after the overnight research campaign + pre-shadow validation (net-of-fee walk-forward IS +32.7R / OOS +22.4R, 3-fold robust, fee-robust to 15bps, additive corr 0.20-0.54). Long-biased BTC trend sleeve; runs on the bybit_1 DEMO account ONLY (paper money) — graduation to real-money bybit_2 stays a separate Tier-3 gate.

trend_donchian_1h.short: trend_donchian on 1h with a wide trail, BTCUSDT (shadow A/B)
trend_donchian_1h.how_it_works: A faster-timeframe / wider-trail shadow A/B of the LIVE trend_donchian flagship: the same Donchian-breakout entry + Chandelier ATR trail, but on 1h candles with donchian 20 / trail_mult 5.0 (vs the live 2h / trail 3.5). Reuses the same strategy unit parametrised by its own config block - a distinct instance, not a change to the live 2h strategy. Wired execution: shadow on bybit_1 (demo) 2026-06-01 after the overnight research found it the single strongest lead (net-of-fee walk-forward IS +42.4R / OOS +43.8R near-symmetric, 3-fold robust, fee-robust to 15bps) and only 0.46 correlated to the live 2h trend (additive A/B). Never sends a live order until promoted (Tier-3).

mes_trend_long_1d.short: MES daily long-only trend, equity-index diversifier (live, IBKR paper)
mes_trend_long_1d.how_it_works: A BTC-uncorrelated equity-index diversifier: Donchian-breakout + Chandelier ATR trail on the MES (Micro E-mini S&P 500) daily candle, reusing the trend_donchian unit but GATED LONG-ONLY (short signals are suppressed) because the equity-index edge is the long side - the secular uptrend punishes trend-breakout shorts. Runs on the IBKR ib_paper account. Wired execution: shadow 2026-06-01, then PROMOTED to execution: live 2026-06-02 (operator policy: paper accounts exist to test strategies, so they execute - IBKR PAPER money, no real-money risk). On SPX (the CFD proxy) long-only trend is net-positive in-sample and out-of-sample across three independent families (trend/TSMOM/MA-cross) with near-zero correlation to the BTC roster and tiny drawdown. CAVEAT: validated on SPX500-CFD, not live MES (whose history is short ~16mo) - it now collects the live-instrument data via real paper execution; re-confirm before any promotion to a REAL-money IB account (ib_live, Tier-3).

mgc_pullback_1d.short: Micro Gold daily HTF-pullback diversifier (live, IBKR paper)
mgc_pullback_1d.how_it_works: A WS-A-validated, BTC-uncorrelated diversifier on Micro Gold (MGC, COMEX/IBKR). It reuses the htf_pullback_trend_2h unit on the daily candle: an HTF trend filter (price above/below the Donchian-40 midline) plus a pullback ENTRY - in an uptrend it buys when the close pulls back into the lower 0.618 of the recent 15-bar range on a bullish confirmation bar; symmetric for downtrends/shorts (it trades BOTH directions, no long-only gate). The exit is a wide Chandelier ATR trail (atr_stop 2.0 / trail_mult 4.0) so winners run; risk multiplier 0.3. Runs on the IBKR ib_paper account, execution: live (paper accounts exist to test strategies, so they EXECUTE - IBKR PAPER money, no real-money risk). WS-A S2/S3-validated: Gold/pullback passed the diversifier re-tune (a roster lead), the significance + robustness test, and the fee-headroom test (survives >30bps round-trip). Tier-3, awaiting operator approval to deploy; a real-money IB account (ib_live) stays a separate Tier-3 gate. RISK: log-but-inert if ib_paper lacks COMEX metals market-data entitlement.

mhg_pullback_1d.short: Micro Copper daily HTF-pullback diversifier (live, IBKR paper)
mhg_pullback_1d.how_it_works: A WS-A-validated, BTC-uncorrelated diversifier on Micro Copper (MHG, COMEX/IBKR), the sibling of mgc_pullback_1d. It reuses the htf_pullback_trend_2h unit on the daily candle: an HTF trend filter (price above/below the Donchian-40 midline) plus a pullback ENTRY - in an uptrend it buys when the close pulls back into the lower 0.5 of the recent 15-bar range on a confirmation bar; symmetric for downtrends/shorts (it trades BOTH directions, no long-only gate). The exit is a wide Chandelier ATR trail (atr_stop 2.0 / trail_mult 4.0) so winners run; risk multiplier 0.3. Runs on the IBKR ib_paper account, execution: live (paper accounts exist to test strategies, so they EXECUTE - IBKR PAPER money, no real-money risk). WS-A S2/S3-validated: Copper/pullback passed the diversifier re-tune (a roster lead), the significance + robustness test, and the fee-headroom test (survives >30bps round-trip). Tier-3, awaiting operator approval to deploy; a real-money IB account (ib_live) stays a separate Tier-3 gate. RISK: log-but-inert if ib_paper lacks COMEX metals market-data entitlement.

xauusd_trend_1h.short: Gold 1h trend-follower (OANDA practice) — Donchian-20 breakout with a Chandelier ATR trail, both directions.
xauusd_trend_1h.how_it_works: Watches XAU/USD 1-hour candles on the OANDA practice account. When price breaks above (or below) the highest high (lowest low) of the prior 20 bars, it enters in the breakout direction with an initial stop 2.5x ATR(14) away, then trails the stop at 3.0x ATR so winners run and exits happen on the trail. Validated as the strongest cell of the M15 Phase-0 sweep (net-of-fee train +78.4R, out-of-sample +36.8R); parameters are pinned to exactly that validated configuration. The builder stands down over the FX weekend close (Fri 21:00 -> Sun 21:00 UTC) so stale candles never produce entries.

spy_trend_long_1d.short: SPY daily long-only trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — Donchian-30 breakout with a 4x ATR trail; the ETF replacement for the MES futures leg.
spy_trend_long_1d.how_it_works: Watches the S&P 500 ETF on daily candles during US market hours. A close above the highest high of the prior 30 days triggers a long entry (shorts are suppressed - the equity-index edge is the long side) with a 2.5x ATR(14) initial stop, then a 4x ATR trailing stop manages the exit. Orders go to the Alpaca paper account as bracket orders so the stop and target live at the broker. Validated in the M15 Phase-0 sweep mirroring the live MES futures strategy (train +16.0R, out-of-sample +9.2R).

qqq_trend_long_1d.short: QQQ daily long-only trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — Donchian-30 breakout with a 4x ATR trail; equity-index ETF diversifier.
qqq_trend_long_1d.how_it_works: Same logic as the SPY leg on the Nasdaq-100 ETF: daily Donchian-30 breakout entries, long-only, 2.5x ATR stop, 4x ATR trail, bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account during US market hours. Validated in the M15 Phase-0 sweep (train +16.2R, out-of-sample +10.9R). Distinct from the unproven QQQ 5-minute intraday research, which stays shadow-only.

tqqq_trend_long_1d.short: TQQQ (3x Nasdaq-100) daily long-only trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — leveraged sibling of the QQQ leg; Donchian-30 breakout with a 4x ATR trail.
tqqq_trend_long_1d.how_it_works: Identical trend_donchian logic and params to the QQQ leg (daily Donchian-30 breakout, long-only, 2.5x ATR stop, 4x ATR trail, bracket orders during US market hours) applied to the 3x-leveraged Nasdaq-100 ETF on the Alpaca paper account. Position size is risk-normalised (ATR-based), so 3x leverage does not enlarge the bet — it lowers the per-share price for capital efficiency. Backtested on the actual TQQQ price series (which already embeds the daily-rebalance volatility decay and ~0.95% expense ratio): net +13.8R OOS 2019-2026, paper_ready, 2x-fee headroom, beat the QQQ cell — the trend filter keeps it out of the high-volatility chop where leveraged decay bites. Paper soak first; real-money promotion is operator- and account_compat_matrix-gated. See docs/research/leveraged-etf-research-2026-06-30.md.

qld_trend_long_1d.short: QLD (2x Nasdaq-100) daily long-only trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — lower-decay 2x sibling of the TQQQ/QQQ leg; Donchian-30 breakout with a 4x ATR trail.
qld_trend_long_1d.how_it_works: Same trend_donchian logic and params as the QQQ/TQQQ legs applied to the 2x-leveraged Nasdaq-100 ETF on the Alpaca paper account (2x carries less volatility decay than 3x). Backtested on the actual QLD price series (decay + expense embedded): net +12.7R OOS 2019-2026, paper_ready, 2x-fee headroom. Paper soak first; real-money promotion is operator-gated. See docs/research/leveraged-etf-research-2026-06-30.md.

iwm_trend_long_1d.short: IWM daily long-only trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — Donchian-30 breakout with a 4x ATR trail; small-cap (Russell 2000) breadth leg.
iwm_trend_long_1d.how_it_works: Same logic as the SPY/QQQ legs on the Russell-2000 small-cap ETF: a daily close above the highest high of the prior 30 days triggers a long entry (shorts suppressed), with a 2.5x ATR(14) initial stop and a 4x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account during US market hours. Adds small-cap breadth to the large-cap SPY/QQQ legs. From the ETF-breadth daily sweep (2026-06-20) it was the only live_ready cell, positive in every walk-forward fold (pooled book Sharpe 3.88, all holdouts positive).

gld_pullback_1d.short: GLD daily pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing gold trend; the ETF replacement for the MGC futures leg.
gld_pullback_1d.how_it_works: Watches the gold ETF on daily candles during US market hours. When a 40-day trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the deeper 61.8% zone of the recent 15-day range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short validated) with a 2x ATR(14) stop and a 4x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. Validated in the M15 Phase-0 sweep mirroring the live Micro-Gold futures strategy (train +4.9R, out-of-sample +19.7R).

tlt_pullback_1d.short: TLT daily pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing 20+ year Treasury bond trend; long-duration rates leg.
tlt_pullback_1d.how_it_works: Same logic as the GLD leg on the 20+ year Treasury bond ETF: when a 40-day trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the 61.8% zone of the recent 10-day range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 5x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account during US market hours. Adds a duration/rates leg uncorrelated with the equity and gold legs. From the ETF-breadth daily sweep (2026-06-20) it was paper_ready and fee-robust (pooled book Sharpe 3.88, all holdouts positive).

ief_pullback_1d.short: IEF daily pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing 7-10 year Treasury bond trend; intermediate-duration rates leg.
ief_pullback_1d.how_it_works: Same logic as the GLD/TLT legs on the 7-10 year Treasury bond ETF: when a 30-day trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the 50% zone of the recent 10-day range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 5x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account during US market hours. The intermediate-duration complement to TLT's long duration. From the ETF-breadth daily sweep (2026-06-20) it was paper_ready and fee-robust (pooled book Sharpe 3.88, all holdouts positive).

gld_pullback_1h.short: GLD intraday (1h) pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing gold trend on the 1-hour timeframe; intraday ETF pilot.
gld_pullback_1h.how_it_works: The intraday (1h) sibling of the daily GLD pullback leg, on the gold ETF during US market hours. When a 60-bar trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the 50% zone of the recent 12-bar range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 4x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. From the intraday 1h ETF sweep (2026-06-20 § 0e) the trail4 variant was live_ready (+78.9R, +61.5R at 2x fees). Pilot for the intraday ETF-breadth sleeve (rollout A, 0.3 risk fraction).

slv_trend_1h.short: SLV intraday (1h) bidirectional trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — Donchian-24 breakout, both directions; silver intraday ETF pilot.
slv_trend_1h.how_it_works: A 1-hour Donchian-24 breakout trend-follower on the silver ETF during US market hours, trading BOTH directions (silver trends down as well as up — there is no long-only suppression): a close beyond the 24-bar high triggers a long, beyond the 24-bar low a short, each with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 4x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. From the intraday 1h ETF sweep (2026-06-20 § 0e) the both-sides Donchian-24 variant was live_ready (+85.5R, +77R at 2x fees). Pilot for the intraday ETF-breadth sleeve (rollout A, 0.3 risk fraction).

spy_pullback_1h.short: SPY intraday (1h) pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing S&P-500 trend on the 1-hour timeframe; intraday ETF rollout 2b.
spy_pullback_1h.how_it_works: The intraday (1h) sibling of the GLD pullback leg, on the S&P-500 ETF during US market hours. When a 60-bar trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the 61.8% zone of the recent 12-bar range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 5x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. From the intraday 1h ETF sweep (2026-06-20 § 0e) the frac618 variant was +42R (+30.6R at 2x fees). Round 2b completing the intraday ETF-breadth sleeve (0.3 risk fraction).

qqq_pullback_1h.short: QQQ intraday (1h) pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing Nasdaq-100 trend on the 1-hour timeframe; intraday ETF rollout 2b.
qqq_pullback_1h.how_it_works: The intraday (1h) sibling of the GLD pullback leg, on the Nasdaq-100 ETF during US market hours (same parameters as spy_pullback_1h). When a 60-bar trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the 61.8% zone of the recent 12-bar range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 5x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. From the intraday 1h ETF sweep (2026-06-20 § 0e) the frac618 variant was +45.3R (+36.7R at 2x fees). Round 2b completing the intraday ETF-breadth sleeve (0.3 risk fraction).

tlt_pullback_1h.short: TLT intraday (1h) pullback trader (Alpaca paper) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing 20+ year Treasury bond trend on the 1-hour timeframe; intraday ETF rollout 2b.
tlt_pullback_1h.how_it_works: The intraday (1h) sibling of the GLD pullback leg, on the long-duration Treasury bond ETF during US market hours. When a 60-bar trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the 50% zone of the recent 12-bar range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 4x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. From the intraday 1h ETF sweep (2026-06-20 § 0e) the trail4 variant was +50.6R (+34R at 2x fees). Round 2b completing the intraday ETF-breadth sleeve (0.3 risk fraction).

uso_trend_1h.short: USO intraday (1h) long-only trend-follower (Alpaca paper) — Donchian-24 breakout, long side only; crude-oil intraday ETF rollout 2b.
uso_trend_1h.how_it_works: A 1-hour Donchian-24 breakout trend-follower on the crude-oil ETF during US market hours, LONG-ONLY (shorts suppressed — the both-sides variant was rejected in the sweep): a close beyond the 24-bar high triggers a long with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 4x ATR trailing exit, via bracket orders on the Alpaca paper account. From the intraday 1h ETF sweep (2026-06-20 § 0e) the long-only Donchian-24 variant was live_ready (+39.5R, +35.2R at 2x fees). Round 2b completing the intraday ETF-breadth sleeve (0.3 risk fraction).

eth_pullback_2h.short: ETH/USDT 2h pullback trader (Bybit demo) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing Ethereum trend; the alt-sleeve sibling of the live BTC pullback strategy.
eth_pullback_2h.how_it_works: Watches ETH/USDT perpetuals on 2-hour candles around the clock. When a 40-bar trend filter is in force and price pulls back into the deeper half of the recent 10-bar range, it enters in the trend direction (both long and short) with a 2.5x ATR(14) stop and a 5x ATR trailing exit — exactly the parameters of the live BTC pullback strategy, which the M15 alt sweep validated unchanged on ETH (train +35.4R, out-of-sample +33.5R net of fees, the sweep's best out-of-sample expectancy). Runs on the Bybit demo account (paper money); note ETH moves largely with BTC, so this adds trade frequency rather than diversification.

mgc_trend_1h.short: Micro-gold-futures (MGC) 1h trend-follower (IBKR paper) — Donchian-20 breakout with a Chandelier ATR trail, both directions; the IBKR sibling of xauusd_trend_1h.
mgc_trend_1h.how_it_works: Watches MGC (COMEX micro gold futures) 1-hour candles on the IBKR ib_paper (paper-money) account. When price breaks above (or below) the highest high (lowest low) of the prior 20 bars, it enters in the breakout direction with an initial stop 2.5x ATR(14) away, then trails the stop at 3.0x ATR (Chandelier); exits are trail-managed (no fixed TP). Same validated gold edge as xauusd_trend_1h on a lower-cost venue (micro futures ~1-1.5 bps round-trip). Risk 0.3x the account's per-trade risk_pct. Paper soak to build a real-fill track record before any real-money consideration.

trend_donchian_sol.short: Donchian-breakout trend-follower on 1h SOLUSDT for the Breakout prop account (live tickets, long-only).
trend_donchian_sol.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit: enters on a Donchian(20) channel breakout, initial stop 2.5x ATR(14), sole profit-exit a Chandelier ATR trailing stop at 5.0x, min-confidence 0.60, on the 1h candle. LONG-ONLY (the live builder suppresses shorts) — the Breakout daily-swap long-only A/B showed SOL's edge holds long-only. Routed to the Breakout prop account via the manual browser-bridge: it emits a paste-ready ticket (Telegram/FCM) for supervised manual placement in the Breakout terminal rather than sending a live exchange order; per-trade risk is the prop account's 1.5%. GATE: robust PASS on real Bybit perp + Breakout daily-swap (funded 12-mo EV +$1,693 @1.5%, 4/4 OOS folds).

trend_donchian_eth.short: Donchian-breakout trend-follower on 1h ETHUSDT for the Breakout prop account (live tickets, two-sided).
trend_donchian_eth.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit: enters on a Donchian(20) channel breakout, initial stop 2.5x ATR(14), sole profit-exit a Chandelier ATR trailing stop at 5.0x, min-confidence 0.60, on the 1h candle. BOTH-SIDES (no long_only) — unlike SOL, ETH's edge is short-side-dependent (the long-only A/B flipped it negative). Routed to the Breakout prop account via the manual browser-bridge: it emits a paste-ready ticket (Telegram/FCM) for supervised manual placement in the Breakout terminal rather than sending a live exchange order; per-trade risk is the prop account's 1.5%. GATE: marginal PASS (Breakout daily swap eats 57% of gross); promoted shadow -> live 2026-06-17 (operator-approved) as a supervised ping.

trend_donchian_eth_4h.short: Donchian-breakout trend-follower on 4h ETHUSDT (Bybit demo) — a paper_ready alt cell run on demo for ML/decision soak.
trend_donchian_eth_4h.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit on ETH/USDT perpetuals at the 4-hour candle: enters on a Donchian(20) channel breakout, initial stop 2.5x ATR(14), sole profit-exit a Chandelier ATR trailing stop at 5.0x, min-confidence 0.60. Both-sides (no long-only) — matching the WS-C validation run. Routed ONLY to the Bybit demo account bybit_1 (paper money) for decision/ML soak; it is NOT yet live-money-ready. GATE: the M15 WS-C k-fold sweep classed the trend_4h cell paper_ready — net-of-fee positive overall and surviving 2x fees, but failing the strict every-fold gate on the recent (late-2025) regime, so it stays on demo until an ADX/regime entry gate clears the losing fold (SRQ-20260618-001).

trend_donchian_sol_4h.short: Donchian-breakout trend-follower on 4h SOLUSDT (Bybit demo) — a paper_ready alt cell run on demo for ML/decision soak.
trend_donchian_sol_4h.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit on SOL/USDT perpetuals at the 4-hour candle: enters on a Donchian(20) channel breakout, initial stop 2.5x ATR(14), sole profit-exit a Chandelier ATR trailing stop at 5.0x, min-confidence 0.60. Both-sides (no long-only) — matching the WS-C validation run. Routed ONLY to the Bybit demo account bybit_1 (paper money) for decision/ML soak; it is NOT yet live-money-ready. GATE: the M15 WS-C k-fold sweep classed the trend_4h cell paper_ready — net-of-fee positive overall and surviving 2x fees, but failing the strict every-fold gate on the recent (late-2025) regime, so it stays on demo until an ADX/regime entry gate clears the losing fold (SRQ-20260618-001).

trend_donchian_xrp_4h.short: Donchian-breakout trend-follower on 4h XRPUSDT (Bybit demo) — a paper_ready alt cell run on demo for ML/decision soak.
trend_donchian_xrp_4h.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit on XRP/USDT perpetuals at the 4-hour candle: enters on a Donchian(20) channel breakout, initial stop 2.5x ATR(14), sole profit-exit a Chandelier ATR trailing stop at 5.0x, min-confidence 0.60. Both-sides (no long-only) — matching the WS-C validation run. Routed ONLY to the Bybit demo account bybit_1 (paper money) for decision/ML soak; it is NOT yet live-money-ready. GATE: the M15 WS-C k-fold sweep classed the trend_4h cell paper_ready — net-of-fee positive overall and surviving 2x fees, but failing the strict every-fold gate on the recent (late-2025) regime, so it stays on demo until an ADX/regime entry gate clears the losing fold (SRQ-20260618-001).

sol_pullback_2h.short: SOL/USDT 2h pullback trader (Bybit demo) — buys/sells pullbacks within the prevailing SOL trend; a paper_ready alt-sleeve sibling of the live BTC pullback strategy.
sol_pullback_2h.how_it_works: Watches SOL/USDT perpetuals on 2-hour candles around the clock, reusing the htf_pullback_trend_2h unit at EXACTLY the live BTC parameters (40-bar trend filter, entries on a pullback into the deeper half of the recent 10-bar range, 2.5x ATR(14) stop, 5x ATR trailing exit, both directions). Routed ONLY to the Bybit demo account bybit_1 (paper money) for decision/ML soak; it is NOT yet live-money-ready. GATE: the M15 WS-C k-fold sweep classed the htf_pullback_2h cell paper_ready — net-of-fee positive overall and surviving 2x fees, failing only the strict every-fold gate on the recent regime (SRQ-20260618-002). Note alts move largely with BTC/ETH, so this adds trade frequency rather than diversification.

eth_pullback_prop_2h.short: ETH/USDT 2h pullback trader — SWAP-ROBUST prop variant (Breakout, shadow/draft). Same entries as eth_pullback_2h but with tighter exits so multi-day holds don't bleed to the prop venue's daily swap.
eth_pullback_prop_2h.how_it_works: Watches ETH/USDT on 2-hour candles. Enters on a pullback within a 40-bar Donchian-midline trend (ADX>=25 regime gate), same as eth_pullback_2h, but exits sooner: a real 6R take-profit cap plus a tighter 3.5x ATR Chandelier trail (vs the live 50R sentinel / 5.0 trail). The Breakout prop account charges a flat 0.033%/day swap while a position is held; shortening holds keeps swap drag low (32% of gross). At that real rate the funded-EV gate is strong (realised +$421 over 5y, 12-mo EV +$603 @75.9%, 4/4 walk-forward folds, break-even swap 0.10%/day = 3x headroom). Wired execution: live on breakout_1 (operator-approved 2026-06-25) — on a prop account 'live' emits a manual Telegram/FCM ticket the operator places, never a broker-API auto-fire, so the operator gates every ticket.

trend_donchian_sol_prop.short: SWAP-ROBUST prop EXIT variant of trend_donchian_sol (1h SOLUSDT, long-only) for Breakout — same entries, tighter exits so multi-day holds don't bleed to the daily swap. DRAFT/shadow until the prop EV gate passes.
trend_donchian_sol_prop.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit on 1h SOLUSDT with the SAME entries as trend_donchian_sol (Donchian(20) breakout, 2.5x ATR(14) initial stop, min-confidence 0.60, LONG-ONLY), but with the eth_pullback_prop_2h SWAP-ROBUST exit recipe: a real 6R take-profit cap (vs the live 50R sentinel) and a tighter 3.5x ATR Chandelier trail (vs 5.0x). Rationale: on the Breakout daily-swap prop venue HOLD TIME is the cost (swap drag + breach-window exposure for zero upside, BANK-ASAP economics), so the let-winners-run profile is wrong there. Routed to breakout_1 as execution: shadow (observe-only — logs order packages, emits NO prop ticket) until the prop EV/survival gate (account_compat_matrix -> run_ev_montecarlo under breakout.yaml) shows strict net-$ improvement vs the single-far-target baseline without a worse breach probability; promotion shadow->live is operator-gated. Design: docs/research/prop-dynamic-exits-faster-banking-DESIGN.md § 5.

trend_donchian_eth_prop.short: SWAP-ROBUST prop EXIT variant of trend_donchian_eth (1h ETHUSDT, two-sided) for Breakout — same entries, tighter exits so multi-day holds don't bleed to the daily swap. DRAFT/shadow until the prop EV gate passes.
trend_donchian_eth_prop.how_it_works: Reuses the trend_donchian unit on 1h ETHUSDT with the SAME entries as trend_donchian_eth (Donchian(20) breakout, 2.5x ATR(14) initial stop, min-confidence 0.60, BOTH-SIDES — ETH's edge is short-side-dependent), but with the eth_pullback_prop_2h SWAP-ROBUST exit recipe: a real 6R take-profit cap (vs the live 50R sentinel) and a tighter 3.5x ATR Chandelier trail (vs 5.0x). On the Breakout daily-swap venue shortening holds keeps swap drag low. Routed to breakout_1 as execution: shadow (observe-only — logs order packages, emits NO prop ticket) until the prop EV/survival gate (account_compat_matrix -> run_ev_montecarlo under breakout.yaml) shows strict net-$ improvement vs the single-far-target baseline without a worse breach probability; promotion shadow->live is operator-gated. Design: docs/research/prop-dynamic-exits-faster-banking-DESIGN.md § 5.
